title: Recurring Date Field
excerpt:
I would love for the date column to have an option for a “recurring date.” 
We have a list of people that is very fluid and changes frequently and we are using a Monday Calendar Sync to put birthdays, anniversaries, etc …

posts.author: blake.deprato (Blake DePrato)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love for the date column to have an option for a “recurring date.”

We have a list of people that is very fluid and changes frequently and we are using a Monday Calendar Sync to put birthdays, anniversaries, etc automatically into our Outlook calendars. So being able to just mark it recurring would be so much easier than having to bump it a year every time the date has passed.

We created an automation that says “When date arrives, push date by 12 months.” We hope that works but being able to just easily mark it recurring would be so much easier.

posts.author: KyleDanielle (Kyle Seem)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be extremely helpful for our company as well.
